case_title: KEMBA SHAKUR VS. LARONDA LASHUN ANDERSON

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHAKUR, KEMBA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANDERSON, LARONDA LASHUN $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,090.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE: $40.00) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHAKUR, KEMBA AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON, LARONDA LASHUN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SHAKUR, KEMBA AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON, LARONDA LASHUN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-27-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $100.00 SERVED MAR-10-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON, LARONDA LASHUN

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-27-2019. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT ARE PRESENT IN OPEN COURT. AT DEFENDANT'S REQUEST, THE COURT CONTINUED THE HEARING TO MAY-08-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. JUDGE JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-08-2019 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-08-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-08-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF KEMBA SHAKUR IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LARONDA LASHUN ANDERSON IS NOT PRESENT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
